--- RESPONSE ---

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/yes/Makefile.depend
CONTENT:

	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcapsicum \
	lib/libcasper/libcasper \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \
